items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a blue header that reads "documentation for lease enforcement." below the header, there are two bullet points. the first bullet point states that a statement made by someone other than the person testifying, or the party on the other side, is offered to prove the truth of something. the second bullet point provides an example of an apartment owner's testimony that the tenant had been warned about stopping that behavior because the office secretary told the tenant that. the text is in black font on a white background. the style of the image is informational and educational, typical of a professional or academic presentation.
